name: Prefill Cache + 7-Gram Entropy-Adaptive + XSA-all + EBLS
blurb: Cache pre-fill fix for distributed eval: each GPU rank pre-populates 7-gram hash tables with ALL preceding token positions (pure numpy, no NCCL). Equivalent to single-GPU sequential eval. EBLS (3 shared blocks, LoRA rank 8), XSA-all(11), LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, Val-GPTQ int6 + LZMA. Strictly causal: cache updates only after each token is scored. 3-seed mean: 0.6567 (std 0.0003).
author: Robert Sneiderman
